summary: Comprehensive testing of AJPL Calculator massive feature addition - 17 backend tests 100% pass, Frontend UI tests 100% pass. All new features working correctly: Admin login with password, Salespeople management, Feedback questions, Customer tiers, MRP Calculator, Photo upload, Tag number field, Diamond split (Make Bill/MRP), Salesperson dropdown, Mandatory field validation, Mobile menu button fix, Customer profile with birthdays/anniversaries/tiers.
passed_tests: POST /api/calculate/mrp-item calculates MRP correctly (10% discount, GST breakdown)
Customer purchase history with tier calculation
Admin Dashboard - Salespeople sidebar link visible
Admin Dashboard - Feedback Qs sidebar link visible
Admin Dashboard - Notifications sidebar link visible
Salespeople Management page loads with add/delete form
MRP Calculator page with all form fields (tag, item, gross weight, MRP, discounts)
ItemCalculator - Diamond split: Make Bill vs MRP buttons
ItemCalculator - Tag Number field in calculate step
ItemCalculator - Studded charges section for Diamond items
SalesExecDashboard - Mandatory field validation working (toast shows 'Customer Name is mandatory')
Customer Profile page - DOB and Anniversary fields
Customer Profile page - Purchase history list
Mobile menu button - 44x44px touch target size

admin.method: Admin Login link on login page

executive.method: OTP flow - request OTP, get from admin dashboard

seed_data_creation: Created test executive user 'test_exec' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 features from the original problem statement are working: 1) Mobile menu button fixed with 44px touch target, 2) Logo bigger (56px in sidebar, h-20/h-14 classes used), 3) Salesperson dropdown in SalesExecDashboard, 4) Customer database with tiers/birthdays/notifications working via CustomerProfilePage and NotificationsPage, 5) Feedback form at /bill/{id}/feedback, 6) Session auto-termination at 10 PM IST coded in JWT token creation (managers/executives), 7) Mandatory fields validation with toast errors, 8) Multi-bill tabs via Bill Switcher, 9) Tag number field in ItemCalculator step 4, 10) Diamond button split: Make Bill + MRP mode, 11) Photo upload with items in BillPage, 12) Manager dashboard shows customer names (clickable to CustomerProfilePage). OTP delivery is MOCKED - shown on admin dashboard.

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes are shown on admin dashboard instead of being sent via email/SMS
